notableEvents.label: Travis Bazzana pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Travis Bazzana grounds out, first baseman Colt Keith to pitcher Brant Hurter.

notableEvents.label: Patrick Bailey GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Patrick Bailey grounds into a double play, second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to shortstop Kevin McGonigle to first baseman Colt Keith. Steven Kwan out at 2nd. Patrick Bailey out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Hao-Yu Lee reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Travis Bazzana. Zach McKinstry to 2nd. Zach McKinstry advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Travis Bazzana.

notableEvents.label: Travis Bazzana pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Travis Bazzana singles on a line drive to left fielder Riley Greene. Daniel Schneemann to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Tanner Bibee picks off Zach McKinstry at 2nd on throw to second baseman Travis Bazzana.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Torkelson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Torkelson pops out to first baseman Kyle Manzardo in foul territory.
